title: opulus mollis
intro: Opulus mollis, also known as the smooth dogwood or silky dogwood, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Opulus mollis include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Opulus mollis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
